hero.description: No complex Excel or difficult apps needed. Just speak via KakaoTalk or voice while working, and AI will automatically record and analyze your inventory.

mockChat.userMessage: Put 50 boxes of apples harvested today in warehouse 1.
mockChat.aiResponse: ✅ Successfully recorded 50 boxes of apples in warehouse 1. (Current total apple inventory: 150 boxes)

features.title: AI Assistant for Farms
features.subtitle: Anyone can achieve maximum efficiency, even without digital device experience.

voice.title: Voice Recognition Auto-Recording
voice.description: Don't take off your gloves during work. Just send one voice message via KakaoTalk, and AI will analyze the content and quantity to automatically record in your ledger.

typo.title: Smart Typo Correction
typo.description: Even if you say "lemon banana" incorrectly, AI intelligently identifies context and existing inventory to find "lemon verbena".

market.title: Real-time Procurement & Price Integration
market.description: Get procurement bid information and real-time wholesale market prices matched to your inventory situation with just one question.

signup.subtitle: Create a new account to get started
signup.passwordHint: Password must be at least 6 characters

simulator.title: Access Simulator
simulator.description: Experience real inventory management by communicating with a virtual chatbot using chat and voice features.

settings.title: Farm Settings Management
settings.description: Set up zones and items you handle for efficient inventory management.

settings.title: Farm Basic Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage the farm name and zones that MalRoDa AI recognizes.

items.title: Managed Items & Zone Settings
items.subtitle: Please register item names, grades, and zones accurately so MalRoDa can recognize them.
items.csvHelp: CSV File (Required headers: zone, item_name, grade, unit, current_stock)
items.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete? (Cannot delete if there is inventory history)
items.noItems: No items registered. Please add new items.

images.title: Item Images
images.uploadHint: Click or drag images here to upload
images.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this image?

simulator.title: MalRoDa AI Simulator

empty.title: How can I help you?
empty.description: Enter voice commands as text to test. It's convenient to click the examples in the tutorial on the right.

simulator.placeholder: How can I help? (e.g., How much rosemary inventory by warehouse?)
simulator.loading: AI is analyzing data and generating optimal answers...
simulator.microphoneError: Could not access microphone. Please allow microphone access and try again.

visualization.title: Data Visualization
visualization.empty: Query inventory data to see visualization here

tutorial.title: Test Tutorial
tutorial.subtitle: Click sample questions by feature to verify AI responses.

tip.title: TIP
tip.description: After asking a question, open [Debug Logs] to see the intent AI extracted and the actual SQL query executed.

query.title: Inventory Query
questions: How much rosemary inventory do we have?
What's the rosemary inventory in Gonjiam?
How many centella in Seoul zone?

inbound.title: Inbound Processing
questions: 50 rosemary 10cm came in to Seoul zone.

outbound.title: Outbound Processing
questions: Ship out 10 lemon verbena 18cm from Seoul zone.

adjust.title: Adjustment/Disposal
questions: Disposed 5 rosemary 18cm in Gonjiam. Mark as disposed.
Adjust lemon eucalyptus 10cm in warehouse to 0.

admin.title: MalRoDa Admin System
admin.noLogs: No AI analysis logs collected yet.
